<div class="search-bar d-flex f-nowrap f-end f-grow col-padding">
<!-- Search Form -->
<div class="searchbox-parent accent_bg">
<form action="/" method="get" id="search-form">
<input type="hidden" id="apkm-search-post_type" name="post_type" value="app_release"><input type="hidden" id="apkm-search-searchtype" name="searchtype" value="apk"><input type="hidden" id="apkm-search-bundles" name="bundles[]" value="apkm_bundles"><input type="hidden" id="apkm-search-bundles" name="bundles[]" value="apk_files"> <button type="submit" class="searchButton" id="search-button-main">
<svg class="clickable icon search-icon">
<use xlink:href="#apkm-icon-search"></use>
</svg>
</button>
<script>
/**
* Always use type="button" to prevent automatic form submission, which fixes
* Firefox 68 (and other old mobile browsers) that submit the form immediately
* when the search icon is tapped. The viewport width is checked at click time
* rather than page load so that viewport resizing (e.g. tablet rotation) is
* handled correctly.
* On mobile (< 992px): first click expands the search box, second click submits.
* On desktop: click submits directly.
* Keyboard Go/Enter is handled by the submit event listener in theme.js.
*/
(function() {
var btn = document.getElementById('search-button-main');
if (btn) {
btn.type = 'button';
btn.onclick = function(e) {
e.preventDefault();
if (window.innerWidth < 992) {
var parent = document.querySelector('.searchbox-parent');
if (parent && !parent.classList.contains('open')) {
// First click on mobile: expand search box
parent.classList.add('open');
var searchbox = parent.querySelector('.searchbox');
if (searchbox) searchbox.focus();
return false;
}
}
// Desktop, or mobile after search box is already open: submit form.
// If on search results page with advanced filters, use the filter form instead.
var filterForm = document.getElementById('apkm-search-filters');
if (filterForm) {
var applyBtn = document.getElementById('apply-search-form');
if (applyBtn) {
applyBtn.click();
} else {
document.getElementById('search-form').submit();
}
} else {
document.getElementById('search-form').submit();
}
return false;
};
}
})();
</script>
<input type="text" name="s" placeholder="Search" value="" class="searchbox" />
<button type="button" class="search-filter-button">
<svg class="clickable icon search-icon">
<use xlink:href="#apkm-icon-searchfilter"></use>
</svg>
</button>
<button type="button" class="backButton hidden-lg hidden-md" onclick="document.querySelector('.searchbox-parent').classList.remove('open')">
<span class="clickable icon cancel-search-icon">×</span>
</button>
</form>

<div class="row">
<h3 class="tabs-header" title="What's new in Google Gemini 1.0.795460806 (120-640dpi) (Android 9.0+)">What's new in Google Gemini 1.0.795460806</h3>
<div class="notes wrapText ">
<p>The Gemini app is now available in English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Korean and more. See the full list of supported languages and countries here:<br />
<a href="https://support.google.com/?p=gemini_app_requirements_android" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">support.google.com/?p=gemini_app_requirements_android</a></p>

<div role="tabpanel" class="tab-pane " >
<a class="doc-anchor" name="description" data-spy="scroll" data-target=".scroll-spy-container"></a>
<div class="row">
<h3 class="tabs-header" title="Google Gemini 1.0.795460806 (120-640dpi) (Android 9.0+) description">About Google Gemini 1.0.795460806</h3>
<div class="notes wrapText collapsable collapsed">
<p>Supercharge your creativity and productivity with Gemini, your AI assistant from Google.</p><div class='ains ains-18 SxK ains-has-label ains-apkm_apk_page_descriptiontab ai-track' data-ai='WzE4LDEsImFwa21fYXBrX3BhZ2VfZGVzY3JpcHRpb250YWIiLCJhcGttX2dvb2dsZV9hZHMiLDFd'>
<span class="advertisement-text">Advertisement</span><a href="/premium" class="advertisement-text membership-text" title="APKMirror Premium" data-google-vignette="false"><span>Remove ads, dark theme, and more with <img src="/wp-content/themes/APKMirror/images/apple-touch-icon-57x57.png" alt="APKM Premium" width="18" height="18" /> Premium</span></a>
<div class="gooWidget TaM google-ad-square-inline">
<!-- Adsense responsive ad apkm_apk_page_descriptiontab -->
<ins class="adsbygoogle adslot BdW"
style="display:block"
data-ad-client="ca-pub-8776668743582988"
data-ad-slot="3837909683"
data-ad-region="REGION_2"></ins>
<script>
APKM.a(119, '18');
</script>
</div></div>

<p>Gemini gives you direct access to Google’s best family of AI models on your phone so you can:</p>
<p>- Go Live with Gemini to brainstorm ideas, simplify complex topics, and rehearse for important moments. Just click on the Gemini Live button in your Gemini app<br />
- Connect with your favorite Google apps like Search, YouTube, Google Maps, Gmail, and more<br />
- Study smarter and explore any topic with interactive visuals and real-world examples<br />
- Turn any file into a podcast that you can listen to anytime, anywhere<br />
- Create stunning images from just a few words<br />
- Plan trips better and faster<br />
- Get summaries, deep dives, and source links, all in one place<br />
- Brainstorm new ideas, or improve existing ones</p>
<p>Level-up your Gemini app experience by upgrading to the Pro plan–unlock new and powerful features to tackle complex tasks and projects and enjoy industry-leading 1M token context window (enabling Gemini to process up to 1,500 pages of text or 30k lines of code), and:<br />
- Get more access our most powerful model, like 2.5 Pro<br />
- Generate and dive into detailed reports on any topic with Deep Research powered by 2.5 Pro<br />
- Turn words into high-quality, 8 second video clips with video generation with Veo 3, and more. </p>
<p>Google AI Pro is available in 150 countries and territories, and includes additional benefits. Gemini app, as part of Google AI Pro, will continue to be available to qualifying Google Workspace business and education plans. Learn more: <a href="https://gemini.google/subscriptions/" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">gemini.google/subscriptions/</a></p>
<p>Get the best of Gemini app by upgrading to the Ultra plan–unlock the highest level of access and exclusive features to turn anything into anything. Get the highest access to Google’s most powerful model, like 2.5 Pro, and features like video generation with Veo 3 and Deep Research. You’ll also get early access to try our newest AI innovations as they become available, including Agent Mode.</p>
<p>Gemini in Google AI Ultra is available in the US and includes additional benefits as part of a Google AI Ultra subscription. Google AI Ultra is not currently available to Google Workspace business and education customers. Learn more: <a href="https://gemini.google/subscriptions/" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">gemini.google/subscriptions/</a></p>
<p>If you opt in to the Gemini app, it will replace your Google Assistant as the primary assistant on the phone. Some Google Assistant voice features aren't available through the Gemini app yet. You can switch back to Google Assistant in settings.</p>
<p>Review the Gemini Apps Privacy Notice:<br />
<a href="https://support.google.com/gemini?p=privacy_notice" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">support.google.com/gemini?p=privacy_notice</a></p>
<div class="show-more d-flex f-100 accent_color">

<div class="infoSlide t-height">
<p>
<span class="infoSlide-name">Version:</span><span class="infoSlide-value">1.0.869192867(287) for Android 9.0+ (Pie, API 28) </span>

</div>
<div class="modal-body">
<h5>The base and split configuration APKs contained in this APK bundle <span style="word-break: break-all; font-style: italic;">com.google.android.apps.bard_1.0.795460806-272_4arch_7dpi_37lang_de65d93eaabd550c86167763b8fd47ad_apkmirror.com.apkm</span> are signed by Google LLC and upgrade your existing app.<br><br>To install this bundle, you will need <a class="accent_color" href="https://www.apkmirror.com/installer" target="_blank">APKMirror Installer</a>.<br><br>For more information on installing APK bundles, please <a class="accent_color" href="https://www.androidpolice.com/2020/07/04/how-to-download-apps-without-the-play-store-and-why-apkmirror-is-the-best-place-to-get-them/" target="_blank">click here</a>.</h5>

<div class="modal fade" id="redirectPlayStoreModal" tabindex="-1" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="redirectPlayStoreModal" aria-hidden="true">
<div class="modal-dialog">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<h2 class="modal-title fontBlack">Why Can't I Download This APK?</h2>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">
While APKMirror strives to provide APK downloads for as many popular apps as possible, sometimes app developers ask us to
take their apps down and link to an official download source instead, such as the Google Play Store. Please understand that
we have to respect such decisions and therefore cannot offer a direct APK download for this app right now.
</div>
<div class="modal-footer">
<button style="color: white;" type="button" class="accent_bg btn btn-flat" data-dismiss="modal">OK
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="modal fade" id="uploadAPK" tabindex="-1" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="myModalLabel" aria-hidden="true"><div class="modal-dialog"><div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-header">
<div class="h1 fontBlack modal-title">Submit an APK</div> </div>
<div class="modal-body">
<p>Have an APK file for an alpha, beta, or staged rollout update? Just drop it below, fill in any details you know, and we'll do the rest!</p>
<p>On Android, you can use <a href="https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.javiersantos.mlmanager" target="_blank" class="external" rel="nofollow">ML Manager</a>, which has built-in support for uploading to APKMirror.</p>
<p class="modal-spacing"><span class="fontOrange">NOTE:</span> Every APK file is manually reviewed by the APKMirror team before being posted to the site.</p>
<div id="error-message-bar" class="modal-spacing hidden"><span class="fontWarning">ERROR:</span> <span id="errorMessage"></span></div>
<div id="success-message-bar" class="modal-spacing hidden"><span class="fontBlue">SUCCESS:</span> Your files have been uploaded, please check if there were any errors.</div>
<input type="file" multiple="multiple" id="hidden-file-input" class="hidden">
<div class="row d-flex f-a-start upload-main-row">
<div class="f-100 f-sm-50 col-padding p-relative upload-left-column">
<div class="upload-left-main">
<div class="progress progress-striped active upload-progress">
<div id="total-upload-progress" class="progress-bar" style="width: 0%"></div>
</div>
<div class="uploadAreaTable p-relative">
<div class="uploadArea" id="myDropZone">
<div class="uploadCloud dz-message">
<svg class="icon upload-large-icon">
<use xlink:href="#apkm-icon-upload"></use>
</svg>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="f-100 f-sm-50 col-padding upload-right-column no-bypass-blacklist">
<div class="group">
<div class="form-control-wrapper">
<input class="form-control" id="upload-apk-fullname" type="text" placeholder="Your name (shown publicly)">
<div class="floating-label">Your name (shown publicly)</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="group">
<div class="form-control-wrapper">
<input class="form-control" id="upload-apk-email" type="email" placeholder="Your email (stored but not shown publicly)">
<div class="floating-label">Your email (stored but not shown publicly)</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="group">
<div class="form-control-wrapper">
<textarea class="form-control upload-apk-changes-editor" rows="11" id="upload-apk-changes" placeholder="What's new (may be shown publicly)"></textarea>
<div class="floating-label">What's new (may be shown publicly)</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="upload-actions-row">
<div class="upload-actions-left">
</div>
<div class="upload-actions-right">
<button id="btnDismiss" class="btn btn-default hidden" data-dismiss="modal">Close</button>
<button class="buttonUpload btn btn-default hidden" id="btnSubmit">Upload</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div></div></div><style>.tab-content .tab-pane [class*="ai-viewport"], .tab-content .tab-pane [class*="ai-viewport"] .adsbygoogle{display: block !important}</style> <div class="modal fade" id="languages" tabindex="-1" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="languages" aria-hidden="true">
<div class="modal-dialog">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-header">
<h2 class="modal-title fontBlack">Languages</h2>
</div>
<div class="modal-body">
Arabic/العربية (ar), Bangla/বাংলা (bn), Bosnian/bosanski (bs), Catalan/català (ca), German/Deutsch (de), English/English (en), Spanish/español (es), Estonian/eesti (et), Finnish/suomi (fi), French/français (fr), Gujarati/ગુજરાતી (gu), Hindi/हिन्दी (hi), Croatian/hrvatski (hr), Hungarian/magyar (hu), Indonesian/Indonesia (in), Italian/italiano (it), Hebrew/עברית (iw), Japanese/日本語 (ja), Kannada/ಕನ್ನಡ (kn), Korean/한국어 (ko), Malayalam/മലയാളം (ml), Marathi/मराठी (mr), Malay/Melayu (ms), Dutch/Nederlands (nl), Polish/polski (pl), Portuguese/português (pt), Russian/русский (ru), Slovak/slovenčina (sk), Serbian/српски (sr), Swedish/svenska (sv), Tamil/தமிழ் (ta), Telugu/తెలుగు (te), Thai/ไทย (th), Turkish/Türkçe (tr), Ukrainian/українська (uk), Vietnamese/Tiếng Việt (vi), Chinese/中文 (zh) </div>
<div class="modal-footer">
<button style="color: white;" type="button" class="accent_bg btn btn-flat" data-dismiss="modal">Got It!
</button>
</div>

}, {

sizes: [[300, 250]],
type: "adunit"
}];

// Stores the defined slots to be used for display later
const definedSlots = [];

// ---- Setup GPT ----
googletag.cmd.push(function() {
// Incontent mapping (desktop, tablet, mobile)
const incontentMapping = googletag.sizeMapping().addSize([1200, 0], [[550, 250], [500, 250], [500, 300], [728, 250], [728, 300], [728, 200], [336, 280], [300, 250], [250, 250], [200, 200]])// large desktop
.addSize([768, 0], [[336, 280], [300, 250], [500, 300], [500, 250], [728, 90], [728, 200], [250, 250], [200, 200]])// tablet / small desktop
.addSize([480, 0], [[300, 200], [300, 250], [336, 280], [300, 100], [320, 100], [300, 50], [320, 50], [250, 250], [200, 200]])// large mobile
.addSize([0, 0], [[320, 50], [320, 100], [300, 250], [300, 100], [300, 50], [250, 250], [200, 200]])// small mobile
.build();

// Sidebar mapping (tall units + fallback)
const sidebarMapping = googletag.sizeMapping().addSize([992, 0], [[300, 200], [300, 250], [250, 250], [350, 250], [336, 280], [200, 200], [320, 100], [300, 50], [300, 100]])// desktop
.addSize([768, 0], [[300, 200], [300, 250], [250, 250], [350, 250], [336, 280], [200, 200], [320, 100], [300, 50], [300, 100]])// tablet
.addSize([0, 0], [[300, 250], [320, 100], [320, 50], [336, 280], [200, 200], [300, 100]])// mobile fallback
.build();

// Define slots and store them
adUnits.forEach(adDef => {
const slot = googletag.defineSlot(adDef.path, adDef.sizes, adDef.id).addService(googletag.pubads());

definedSlots.push(adDef.id);
// Store the slot ID for later use

if (adDef.type === "adunit") {
slot.defineSizeMapping(incontentMapping);
}
if (adDef.type === "sidebar") {
slot.defineSizeMapping(sidebarMapping);
}
}
);

googletag.pubads().disableInitialLoad();
// Prevent ad requests before we check for ad elements
googletag.enableServices();
});

/*googletag.cmd.push(function() {
const unitsToDisplay = [];

definedSlots.forEach(unitId => {
if (document.getElementById(unitId)) {
unitsToDisplay.push(unitId);
}
}
);

if (unitsToDisplay.length > 0) {

unitsToDisplay.forEach(unitId => {
googletag.display(unitId);
}
);
}
});*/

googletag.cmd.push(function() {
const unitsToDisplay = definedSlots.filter(id => document.getElementById(id));

if (!unitsToDisplay.length) return;

// Display all matching slots
unitsToDisplay.forEach(id => googletag.display(id));

// Now refresh only those defined & present slots
const slotsToRefresh = googletag.pubads().getSlots().filter(slot =>
unitsToDisplay.includes(slot.getSlotElementId())
);

googletag.pubads().refresh(slotsToRefresh);
});

</script>
<script>
window.googletag = window.googletag || {
cmd: []
};

let interstitialSlot;
let anchorSlot;

googletag.cmd.push( () => {

anchorSlot = googletag.defineOutOfPageSlot("/5059729/pg_anchor_apkmirror.com", document.body.clientWidth <= 500 ? googletag.enums.OutOfPageFormat.TOP_ANCHOR : googletag.enums.OutOfPageFormat.BOTTOM_ANCHOR, );

// Anchor slots return null if the page or device does not support anchors.
if (anchorSlot) {
anchorSlot.addService(googletag.pubads()).setConfig({
targeting: {
test: "anchor",
},
});
}
// Define a web interstitial ad slot.
interstitialSlot = googletag.defineOutOfPageSlot("/5059729/pg_interstitial_apkmirror.com", googletag.enums.OutOfPageFormat.INTERSTITIAL, );

// Slot returns null if the page or device does not support interstitials.
if (interstitialSlot) {
// Enable optional interstitial triggers and register the slot.
interstitialSlot.addService(googletag.pubads()).setConfig({
interstitial: {
triggers: {
navBar: true,
unhideWindow: true,
},
},
});
}
// REQUIRED when disableInitialLoad() is active:
[anchorSlot, interstitialSlot].forEach(slot => {
if (slot) googletag.display(slot);
});

// must be refreshed or nothing happens
googletag.pubads().refresh([anchorSlot, interstitialSlot].filter(Boolean));
}
);
</script><script>

<span>No ads, dark mode, and more with APKMirror Premium</span>

</span>
<span class="close f-stretch d-flex" aria-label="Close" data-apkm-click-track="close" data-apkm-track-category="Bottom slider"><span aria-hidden="true">&times;</span></span>
</a>
